svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Взвешенная обеспеченность Si (ГОСТ 19.701-90)" id="goals-si"> <mxGraphModel dx="1548" dy="1054" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1150" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=40;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Начало
calculate_goals_si" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="310" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Ввод: сумма на цели x_goals,
список целей G, дата today" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="240" x="300" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_zero" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="x_goals ≤ 0
или G пуст ?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="150" x="345" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ret0" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Вернуть Si = 0,
allocation = {}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="600" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=11;" value="Для каждой цели s c остатком > 0:
urgency = max(1, 12 / месяцев_до_дедлайна)
weight = вес категории ks
priority = weight · urgency" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="270" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="total" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" value="total_priority = Σ priority по целям" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="285" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dec_tot" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="total_priority ≤ 0 ?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="345" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ret0b" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="Вернуть Si = 0,
allocation = {}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="600" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=11;" value="Для каждой цели s:
share = priority_s / total_priority
x_s = min(x_goals · share, остаток_s)
allocation[s] = x_s
weighted_x += x_s · priority_s
weighted_total += остаток_s · priority_s" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="270" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="si" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1" value="Si = min( weighted_x / weighted_total , 1.0 )" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="270" x="285" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Вывод: Si, allocation {цель → сумма}" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="290" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=40;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Конец" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="345" y="950" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="input"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="dec_zero"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" edge="1" parent="1" source="dec_zero" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" target="ret0" value="Да"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ret0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="end"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="695" y="975" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" edge="1" parent="1" source="dec_zero" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" target="loop1" value="Нет"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="total"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6" edge="1" parent="1" source="total" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="dec_tot"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b7" edge="1" parent="1" source="dec_tot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" target="ret0b" value="Да"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b7b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ret0b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="end"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="695" y="975" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b8" edge="1" parent="1" source="dec_tot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" target="loop2" value="Нет"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b9" edge="1" parent="1" source="loop2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="si"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b10" edge="1" parent="1" source="si" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b11" edge="1" parent="1" source="output" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;endArrow=block;" target="end"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Для каждой цели s c остатком > 0:
urgency = max(1, 12 / месяцев_до_дедлайна)
weight = вес категории ks
priority = weight · urgency

div.div:
Для каждой цели s:
share = priority_s / total_priority
x_s = min(x_goals · share, остаток_s)
allocation[s] = x_s
weighted_x += x_s · priority_s
weighted_total += остаток_s · priority_s
